prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, recreate the same German ID card as a clean, realistic flat scan/passport-style document image instead of a photographed card on a dark table. Keep the person, card type, and overall identity-card layout, but remove the tabletop perspective, edge glare, and camera-phone look. Replace the photo area with a properly framed biometric portrait crop showing more of the shoulders and upper chest against a light neutral background, with soft even lighting suitable for an official ID photo. Update the card design to a more modern German ID appearance with a blue EU/DE flag block in the top-left, a cleaner cream security pattern, and holographic security elements including 2 eagle motifs and 1 blue square chip-like mark on the right. Keep the serial number as L01X00T47. Change the personal data to: surname MÜLLER, given name ANNA, date of birth 17.07.1992, nationality DEUTSCH, place of birth BERLIN, expiry date 16.10.2032, and signature Anna Müller. Make it look like a high-resolution official ID card scan, sharp typography, realistic print texture, and subtle holographic reflections.
